  "boss_mechanics": "The Lagavulin Matriarch has 222 HP and is found in the Act 1 Underdocks biome. She starts asleep for 3 turns with 12 Plating (damage reduction). If you deal unblocked damage through her Plating while asleep, she wakes early and is stunned for that turn; otherwise she wakes on her own after 3 turns with no stun. Once awake, she loses her Plating and follows a repeating 4-turn cycle: Turn 1 — Attack, Turn 2 — Attack x2, Turn 3 — Attack + Block, Turn 4 — Strategic/Empower (debuffs your Strength and Dexterity while buffing her own Strength). The fight gets progressively harder the longer it goes due to cumulative stat debuffs on you and scaling Strength on her.",
  "strategy": "Use the 3 sleeping turns to play Power cards like Noxious Fumes, Accuracy, or Afterimage — setting up your engine before she wakes. Poison is the Silent's best win condition here because it bypasses the Strength and Dexterity debuffs she applies; stack Deadly Poison, Poisoned Stab, and Catalyst to ramp damage that doesn't care about your reduced stats. Once she wakes, treat the fight as a damage race — block hard on Turn 2 (double attack) and Turn 3 (attack + block), and use Turn 4 (Empower turn) as your window to dump offensive cards since she isn't attacking. Keep your deck thin so you cycle to your key cards quickly, and end the fight before multiple Empower cycles stack crippling debuffs.",

The Matriarch is one of the easier Act 1 bosses if you use the sleep turns well, but her double-attack turn and scaling Strength can chunk you for 20-30+ damage per turn once awake. The Silent has no built-in healing and only 70 starting HP, so entering below 50 HP is risky.",
  "potion_advice": "Save offensive potions (Poison Potion, Cunning Potion) for after she wakes to accelerate your poison stacks and shorten the fight. Use defensive potions (Block Potion, Ghost in a Jar) on Turn 2 (double attack) or after the first Empower cycle when her Strength-buffed attacks start hitting significantly harder. Do NOT waste potions during the 3 sleeping turns — those are free setup turns. Fire Potions can help break through Plating early to get the stun if you want to wake her on your terms."
